title: Sharks: Who the real killers are
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - A talk about the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - A talk about the historical perspective on sharks and the killing of sharks will be presented to members of the Van Plettenberg Historical Society on Thursday 13 November.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - A talk about the historical perspective on sharks and the killing of sharks will be presented to members of the Van Plettenberg Historical Society on Thursday 13 November."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The speaker will be Bruce Noble, who has been observing the behaviour of great white sharks in Plettenberg Bay for over 20 years."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Between December 1957 and April 1958, at least nine shark attacks occurred along the coast of KwaZulu-Natal.","html":"Between December 1957 and April 1958, at least nine shark attacks occurred along the coast of KwaZulu-Natal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Six people lost their lives.","html":"Six people lost their lives."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tourists fled the Durban area, causing a devastating impact on the local economy. The killing of sharks continues to this day.","html":"Tourists fled the Durban area, causing a devastating impact on the local economy. The killing of sharks continues to this day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Depth charge","html":"Depth charge"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Without thorough research into the possible reason for the sudden increase in shark activity, local authorities made desperate attempts to protect swimmers and surfers from shark attacks.","html":"Without thorough research into the possible reason for the sudden increase in shark activity, local authorities made desperate attempts to protect swimmers and surfers from shark attacks."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Many will remember these attempts which included enclosures built from wooden poles and netting.","html":"Many will remember these attempts which included enclosures built from wooden poles and netting."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A South African Navy frigate even dropped depth charges into the coastal waters, causing few shark fatalities but killing huge numbers of other species.","html":"A South African Navy frigate even dropped depth charges into the coastal waters, causing few shark fatalities but killing huge numbers of other species."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This resulted in many more sharks being attracted into the area to feast on the dead fish. Noble will touch on the blood-soaked and tragic events of Black December 1957, reflecting on the modern history of the South African great white shark.","html":"This resulted in many more sharks being attracted into the area to feast on the dead fish. Noble will touch on the blood-soaked and tragic events of Black December 1957, reflecting on the modern history of the South African great white shark."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"He will reveal how these events and the indiscriminate killing of white sharks still affect us today - and of the impact on our own waters, our tourism and the entire ecosystem of the ocean."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The talk will take place in the Lagoon Room at Beacon Island Resort. A cash bar will be in operation. Book online via Quicket or in person at Barney's Kiosk, Market Square. For additional information, please send an email to [email protected] or phone Len Swimmer on 082 452 1799.","html":"The talk will take place in the Lagoon Room at Beacon Island Resort. A cash bar will be in operation. Book online via Quicket or in person at Barney's Kiosk, Market Square. For additional information, please send an email to [email protected] or phone Len Swimmer on 082 452 1799."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
